title: Melted Sweet Polish Speck Pasta
description: A sweet and crumbly Polish dish featuring speck, mother-sauce-base, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the sliced speck and cook until crispy, stirring occasionally
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and nutritional yeast
Add the flour mixture to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and stir to combine
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
